name: Chocolate Mint Baked Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a small saucepan, combine 1/2 cup milk and the mint-chocolate chips. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until chips are melted and mixture is smooth. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine remaining 1 cup of milk, condensed milk, and eggs; beat until well blended.
4. Add chocolate mixture; beat well.
5. Pour into a 1-quart casserole.
6. Fill a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan with 4 cups of water.
7. Place casserole in baking pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for 50 to 55 minutes.
8. Serve warm or cool completely.
